hints.text: Two coral atolls, Australian territory (counts as Australia); **bright white sand, palms & mowed grass** — far less forested/hilly than Christmas Island
**West Island** car = unique w/ a **snorkel at the front-right** + bed edges visible; **Bantam** car = white w/ rear edges visible (may be fully blurred)
**Bantam Village** = cross-hatched brick pavement; the runway is the **widest paved road** (mowed grass both sides + a follow car)
Many **coast trekkers** on white sand (ocean one side, palms the other); **Direction Island** beaches have noticeably more litter (bricks, styrofoam, dead coral)
**Horsburgh Island** (Pulau Luar) inland trekker = dry yellow grass + sparse vegetation
